src: This is an official implementation for Finer-CAM: Spotting the Difference Reveals Finer Details for Visual Explanation. [CVPR'25] Better understand discriminative traits between similar species.
ja: Finer-CAM: Spotting the Difference Reveals Finer Details for Visual Explanation の公式実装です。[CVPR'25] 類似種間の識別的特徴をより深く理解するためのツール。
